title: Cisco IOS-XE — OSPF single-area with default route

source.description: Standard OSPF single-area configuration with two upstream interfaces, loopback router-id, and default-information originate

config.description: Single-area OSPF with two interfaces in area 0, loopback router-id, default route via upstream, and default-information originate. Clean, well-structured config suitable for basic OSPF interoperability testing.

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei equivalent with ospf [process-id] router-id, area 0, and default-route-advertise

verification.notes: Translation is correct Huawei VRP OSPF. Huawei uses 'ospf enable' on interfaces, 'network <ip> <wildcard>' under area view — this is valid syntax (not Cisco residue). Style tip warning for missing description is non-blocking.
